description: Largest pharmacy chain in Central Europe operating 1000+ pharmacies across Czech Republic, Slovakia, Poland, and Serbia. Offers digital prescription services, e-commerce, and patient support programs.
business_model: B2C - Pharmacy retail; B2B - Corporate health programs
target_market: CEE consumers and employers seeking pharmacy services
competitive_advantage: Largest CEE pharmacy network, digital capabilities, regional presence

varden_fit.rationale: Major pharmacy infrastructure in CEE - potential partner for medication-related occupational health services
